user_prompt: A single collectible MEMORIAL CARD, complete with its ornate GOLDEN rounded-rectangle frame — output the WHOLE card (frame included), transparent outside the rounded card corners. Use reference image 1 (a Nile memorial card) as the STRICT format anchor: same ornate gold border, same rounded-rectangle card shape and proportions, same full-scene painted illustration filling the inside of the frame. Inside the frame, paint the character from reference image 2 in the same cartoon semi-painted game-art style: a cheerful girl with long silver-white hair in a white-and-gold soccer cheerleader outfit, holding gold-and-white pom-poms, shown from the waist up. Behind her a lush green World Cup stadium pitch with a gleaming golden championship trophy, falling golden confetti, warm celebratory lights. Tasteful, wholesome, non-revealing. NO national flags or emblems. ONE SINGLE card, do NOT generate multiple cards or a grid.
